6-apdb.dose_note: There are some users that report to be fatigued for the following days.
6-apdb.name: 6-apdb

properties.after-effects: There are some users that report to be fatigued for the following days.
properties.effects: Euphoria, increased energy/alertness, Decreased need for sleep, Increased sociability, mood lift, increased libido, Excessive talking, Decreased appetite, Weight loss, Sweating, Disturbed sleep patterns, Bruxia, Visual and auditory hallucinations, itchiness, aggressiveness, moodiness.
properties.summary: A stimulant and entactogen related to MDMA and an analogue of MDA. Reported as having fairly psychedelic effects at higher dosages. It is a triple monoamine reuptake inhibitor. It is a potent full agonist of serotonin 2B receptors.
